_note: Curated anchors for the interactive accuracy-vs-speedup playground, consistent with the paper's reported operating points (LazyStack point at the default exit threshold θ≈0.85, cost-weight α≈0.2). The live curve is interpolated between θ=0.5 (max speedup, slight accuracy drop), θ=0.85 (reported LazyStack point), and θ=0.99 (full ensemble: 1× speedup, ceiling accuracy).
